text.title: Google Ads Reporting Dashboards Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real google-ads-reporting engagements. Each pairs a symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Report ships only campaign aggregate; segment deltas hidden.
CPA up 40% for 9 days before anyone noticed.
antipattern.fix: Configure the standard 4 thresholds + Slack/email routing.
Block report send if action queue missing.
